race.description: Win Network Super Maiden Showcase Plate
race.comment: REIGN 'EM IN (9) started hard in the market on debut ($2.70 fav), with a sound on-pace second over 1000m at Wyong. Finds her race second-up and should prove too classy for these. HEAD KAHUNA (4) back for his third prep with a gritty on-pace second over 1000m at Wellington. Gets the gun run again and expected to figure prominently. WAVETON (11) placed on debut two-back at Hawkesbury, then over-raced in the early and middle stages with a fading last over 1000m at Wyong. Deserves another chance in this weaker grade. RUAIRI (5) first-up after 11 months raced on the speed before he peaked on the run to finish fifth over 1000m at Taree. Will appreciate the 3kg claim and has further improvement. Place best.
